extra.reason: Completed. Added Core Data Structures and Formal Verification sections to SPEC-CICLO-001, added formal/quint/ciclo_core.qnt and README, updated agent guide, and verified with quint parse/typecheck/test/run/verify.
Added and verified devenv shell, validation scripts, and development docs.
Completed. Added Claude/Codex project gate hooks, shared guard script, Codex remote setup/maintenance scripts, expanded agent docs, and verified with just hooks, shellcheck, and just check.

Completed runtime/package decision and runnable foundation. Chose Python 3.11+ stdlib-first src/ciclo package; added ciclo and ciclo-demo entrypoints, typed core schemas, fixture tests, and wired pytest/ruff/pyright/wheel build into ciclo-check. Validation: just python, PYTHONPATH=src python -m ciclo.demo, PYTHONPATH=src python -m ciclo.cli runtime, and just check.

Completed Herdr CLI adapter foundation. Added subprocess runner, Herdr error wrapping, explain JSON/text parsing, state and harness normalization, fixture loader, CLI herdr fixture/status commands, and tests. Validation: PYTHONPATH=src python -m ciclo.cli herdr fixture tests/fixtures/herdr_explain_codex_done.json, PYTHONPATH=src python -m ciclo.cli herdr status missing-target-for-ciclo-demo with structured exit 2, just python, and just check.

Completed loop configuration schema. Added review and deploy YAML fixtures, config validation dataclasses, optional PyYAML plus fallback parser, CLI config validation, and tests. Validation: just check.

Completed normalized event and loop state schemas. Added Ciclo event, goal update, loop state structures and required fixtures for agent.state_changed, agent.blocked, repo.changed, loop.goal_updated, and benchmark.scenario_completed. Validation: just check.

Completed Pi/TypeScript runtime pivot. Added package.json Pi extension manifest, strict TypeScript source/tests, demo command, npm lockfile, just/devenv TypeScript gate, and updated spec/agent docs/runtime metadata to make Pi extension package the primary runtime with Python marked transitional. Validation: just check.

Completed TypeScript Herdr CLI polling adapter. Added HerdrClient, default runner, target list parsing with cwd/agent labels, JSON/text explain normalization, structured HerdrError kinds for unavailable/command/parse failures, and fixture-backed tests. Validation: just check.

Completed TypeScript harness plugin registry. Added deterministic registry with Pi, Claude Code, Codex, and unknown observe-only fallback plugins; selection uses Herdr observation metadata and loop harness config with confidence/reason reporting; Pi status tool now reports the selected plugin. Validation: just check.

Completed TypeScript loop config loader and validator. Added dependency-light YAML subset parser, typed project loop config validation, defaults for dry-run/harnesses, actionable ConfigError messages, and review/deploy fixture tests. Validation: just check.

Completed Codex harness plugin. Added bounded prompt request contract and Codex prompt construction with spec ID, Beads task, repo state, acceptance criteria, validation commands, tests/validation reporting, blocker reporting, and safety stop conditions. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed Claude Code harness plugin. Added bounded review/deploy prompt construction, blocked-reason classification for permission/approval/input states, and explicit no-auto-approval language for permission prompts, deploys, destructive commands, credentials, and remote sync. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed low-cost TypeScript repository probe. Added branch/upstream parsing, dirty and staged file extraction from git porcelain status, non-git failure handling, Beads presence detection, configured check discovery, summary formatting, and tests for clean, dirty, non-git, and Beads-present repo cases. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript default-deny policy gate. Added pure policy evaluator with explicit allow/deny/ask_operator/dry_run_only outcomes, default allow for local Beads task creation outside dry-run, prompt sending disabled until configured, tests disabled until configured and allowlisted, deploys disabled by default, and harness permission approvals never auto-approved. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript context budget tracking. Added per-scope context state for harness sessions, loops, remote sessions, and Beads issues; max/used/reserved token accounting; default reserves for system/developer/task/policy/tool/response sections; warning/compact/force thresholds; estimate source attribution; and evidence export. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript Beads work adapter. Added Beads presence detection, bd command-runner boundary, ready/show JSON parsing, structured task snapshots for dependencies/labels/spec IDs/acceptance criteria/external refs, absent-workspace errors, and tests that avoid .beads/issues.jsonl as a source of truth. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript Beads remote database mode detection. Added local, shared_dolt_server, and dolt_remote_sync config interpretation with database identity, remote name or host/port/database details, health status, centralized coordination requirement, and evidence strings. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript context item classification. Added classifier for spec, Beads, audit, repo, Herdr, MCP, remote-session, and transcript inputs with lifecycle tags, priority, character-heuristic token estimate, scope attribution, sensitive/redundant/stale/discardable detection, and redaction-before-persist flags. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript bounded context pack assembly. Added deterministic pack builder for Codex, Claude Code, Pi, and generic harnesses; classified item prioritization; token-budget fitting; stale/redundant omission; sensitive remote/MCP/transcript redaction; render helper; and tests for active Beads/repo/Herdr priority, stale transcript omission, harness prefixes, redaction, and token budget omissions. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript Beads Dolt remote pull/push coordination. Added DoltRemoteSyncCoordinator that pulls before ready selection, re-reads a bead before claim, refuses already-claimed work, claims through bd update --claim, pushes after claim/update when configured, wraps pull/push/claim errors as fail-closed sync errors, and never uses .beads/issues.jsonl as coordination state. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript shared Beads Dolt SQL server coordination. Added SharedDoltServerCoordinator with injectable connection health probe, ready listing behind health checks, re-read-before-claim using Beads native claim, progress-note update through Beads, and fail-closed behavior when the required shared DB is unavailable. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Completed TypeScript Beads remote DB health/conflict evaluator. Added remote health decision that blocks dispatch on unavailable required DB, conflict, or schema skew; emits planner evidence/operator feedback; drafts Beads blocker payloads; allows degraded optional coordination with warning. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented TypeScript Ciclo session modes. Single mode maps local actions to the owner principal without login; multiuser mode denies mutating actions without an authenticated principal while allowing read-only anonymous status at the session-mode layer. Added TS tests and updated Quint auth-mode transition coverage. Validation: just typescript, just quint, just check.

Reframed Ciclo as a standalone TypeScript orchestrator agent. Added standalone app/CLI status surface, kept Pi as an internal brain provider adapter, updated runtime metadata, package description/bin, docs/spec/agent guide language, and tests. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented OAuth-style device authorization grant foundation for CLI, MCP HTTP, and remote worker clients. Added start response with device/user codes and verification URL, interval/expiry-aware polling, slow_down handling, approval/denial/expired/missing outcomes, token response binding to principal/session/client/scopes, and redacted audit evidence that excludes codes and token material. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented token lifecycle and principal introspection foundation. Added hashed-at-rest token registry with metadata bound to principal/session/client/scopes/expiry/target constraints, access-token introspection, whoami, refresh with old-token revocation, revoke by access or refresh token, and redacted evidence. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented scoped roles and grants. Added role default capabilities for owner/operator/maintainer/contributor/viewer/agent_service, explicit capability extension, scope matching for session/repo/loop/bead labels/harness/remote target/command classes/time windows, and grant evaluation evidence. Updated Quint with remote registration ownership invariant and regressions. Validation: just typescript, just quint, and just check.

Implemented access enforcement for work, command, question, remote, and admin actions. Added action-to-capability mapping, single-mode owner authorization, multiuser token/principal validation, scoped grant checks, safe denial audit records, accepted audit records, and authorized operator routing for denied requests. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented Beads work selection and claim flow. Added selector for labels, excluded labels, issue type, spec ID, priority ordering, unresolved dependencies, and loop capacity; claim flow now honors authorization, reads ready work, rechecks selected bead before claim, avoids already-claimed/blocked work, claims through Beads, and records selected harness/principal metadata in a Beads note. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented dry-run response planner. Added event-driven planner responses for wait, summarize, nudge, ask_user, claim_task, create_task, update_loop_goal, and stop_loop; each plan is dry-run only, contains one response, includes a policy decision, work ID when selected, and evidence from events, Herdr, repo probe, Beads selection, remote DB health, context budget, and policy. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented Beads-to-harness prompt builder. Converts Beads snapshots into bounded HarnessPromptRequest payloads for Claude/Codex, including bead ID, spec fallback, title/description, parsed acceptance criteria, dependency/blocker context, repo/context details, validation commands, and plugin stop conditions. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented Beads progress and close policy controller. Added BeadsClient.close, recordBeadsProgress for progress/blocker/validation/final-summary notes, and closeBeadsTaskWithPolicy with access denial, policy denial/approval, acceptance evidence, passing validation evidence, recheck, final summary note, close, and optional Beads remote push. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented smart compaction after Beads task transitions. Added context-compaction module with deterministic idempotency keys, durable Beads memory notes for completed/blocked/handed-off transitions, preservation of decisions, validation, blockers, changed files, follow-ups, included/omitted context, continuation summary output, budget evidence, and optional Beads remote push. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented context memory redaction policy. Added configurable redactor for secrets, bearer tokens, private keys, raw transcript memory, remote hosts, and absolute remote paths; wired compaction to redact persisted Beads notes, returned continuation summaries, and blocked-task metadata; records count-only redaction metadata/evidence without sensitive values. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented context threshold enforcement in the response planner. Added measure_context, build_context_pack, and smart_compact dry-run responses; planner now measures before context-heavy dispatch without a budget, warns/builds bounded packs on high usage, emits smart compact at compact/force thresholds, and blocks force-compact dispatch unless contextForceCompactOverride is set with explicit evidence. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Defined Ciclo MCP tool/resource/prompt schemas. Added typed src/mcp-contract.ts catalog covering status, loop detail, ready work, work claim/start/update/close, questions, feedback, Beads-native tracker sync, remote sessions, auth device flow, whoami, grant, and revoke; every entry declares input/output schema, permissions/capabilities, side effects, and audit/redaction requirements. Updated spec and agent guide to make the catalog the source of truth. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented Herdr remote attach adapter. HerdrClient now supports listRemoteTargets and explainRemote using Herdr's remote attach semantics: herdr --remote <target> with optional --session <name>, then normal agent commands. Added remote setup blocker classification for missing remote Herdr, unsupported remote platform, and generic attach failure; remote observations include redacted audit evidence and no direct SSH inspection is introduced. Validation: just typescript and just check. Source checked: https://herdr.dev/docs/persistence-remote/.

Implemented Herdr remote session registry and heartbeat. Added in-memory RemoteSessionRegistry for configured Herdr remote targets with optional named sessions, project/repo identity, owner, capabilities, active loop/work, and liveness state. Heartbeats call Herdr remote attach via explainRemote, failed attach/remote Herdr errors mark sessions lost with setup blockers, timeout scanning marks stale/lost, detach is explicit, and active Beads ownership is preserved across stale/lost/detached transitions. Validation: just typescript and just check.

Implemented duplicate Beads claim prevention across remote sessions. Claim flow now accepts active remote owners, rechecks Beads state before mutation, rejects selected work already owned by another active session, emits operator feedback evidence for conflicts, records claiming session metadata in Beads notes, and can update remote session ownership after successful claim. RemoteSessionRegistry now exposes activeOwnersForBead and assignWork while preserving ownership for stale/lost/detached sessions. Validation: just typescript and just check.
Implemented local MCP stdio server with read-only status, loop, ready work, questions, feedback resources and JSON-RPC stdio entrypoints. Validation: just check passed.

Integrated shared MCP/API auth context with stdio owner trust, multiuser launcher principals, MCP HTTP bearer enforcement, whoami/access grant views, and MCP device token start/poll wiring. Validation: just check passed.
Implemented policy-guarded MCP mutation tools for claim/start/update/close/sync using existing Beads, policy, auth, idempotency, and audit paths. Validation: just check passed.
Implemented typed dry-run response audit records with Herdr/repo/loop/policy traceability, redacted evidence, stable IDs, and in-memory log API. Validation: just check passed.

Implemented authorization audit records for accepted, denied, and delegated multiuser actions with principal/session/grant/token metadata and secret redaction; MCP writes access audit entries. Validation: just check passed.

Implemented operator question and feedback routing with queueing, dedupe, answer routing to loop/bead/harness/remote context, MCP tools/resources, audit entries, and tests. Validation: just check passed.

Added deterministic Herdr observation fixtures for working blocked done idle unknown plus unavailable-command replay, with TypeScript and Python adapter/client coverage that normalizes the fixtures without a live Herdr server. Validation: just check passed.

Extended formal/quint/ciclo_core.qnt with context compaction state, compact/drop transcript transitions, and invariants that transcript context is dropped only after durable Beads memory exists and sensitive memory is redacted before persistence/drop. Updated devenv and docs so just quint verifies the new invariants. Validation: just quint and just check passed.

Standardized Ciclo Beads metadata across claim, progress, blocker, and close notes. Added shared formatter with stable action/bead/loop/harness/principal/session/remote-session fields, preserved existing human-readable note prefixes, avoided remote host/path and token material, and wired MCP update/close calls to include the current session ID. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented authenticated MCP HTTP transport over the existing JSON-RPC handler. Added localhost default binding, /mcp POST handling, CORS/Origin validation, bearer propagation for multiuser HTTP clients, non-local bind auth guard, dry-run mutation support, and HTTP tool-call audit entries. Added CLI/bin/npm entrypoints for ciclo-mcp-http. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented structured remote session handoff summaries. Added builder/reporter for blocked, detached, done, and lost remote sessions with loop ID, Beads ID, harness, state, final summary, artifacts, blockers, requested next action, and evidence; reports handoffs through OperatorRoutingStore as deduplicated structured feedback. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented Beads-native remote tracker sync trigger. Added a provider-agnostic BeadsRemoteTrackerSync abstraction with dry-run/status support, redacted audit evidence, idempotency deduplication, last-sync cursors, retry state, and required-vs-optional target handling. Wired MCP ciclo_sync_remote_trackers through access, policy, audit, and configured runtime trigger without implementing Jira/Linear providers in Ciclo. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented Beads-native Jira sync support. Added Jira integration detection through bd config get for jira.url and jira.project, Jira external-ref recognition from Beads task snapshots, and construction of a provider-agnostic Jira tracker target for the existing BeadsRemoteTrackerSync trigger. Covered configured Jira, refs-without-config, and detected-target sync execution without implementing a Jira provider in Ciclo. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented Beads-native Linear sync support. Added Linear integration detection through bd config get linear.team_id, Linear external-ref recognition from Beads task snapshots, and construction of a provider-agnostic Linear tracker target for the existing BeadsRemoteTrackerSync trigger. Covered configured Linear, refs-without-config, and detected-target sync execution without implementing a Linear provider in Ciclo. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Defined benchmark scenario fixture format. Added schema_version 1 JSON fixture contract in src/benchmark-scenario.ts covering repo snapshots, Beads ready/claimed/blocked state, remote DB/tracker snapshots, Herdr events, harness context, loop config, policy config, MCP calls, remote sessions, auth/context snapshots, expected traits, disallowed traits, drivers, and judges. Added canonical codex_done_dirty_repo_review fixture and validation tests; documented schema in SPEC-CICLO-001. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented deterministic benchmark safety checks. Added provider-independent candidate response model and hard-fail checks for sends while Herdr reports working, destructive action without policy approval, scope expansion outside loop, duplicate nudges after unchanged state, ignored blocked state, and premature completion without blockers/evidence resolved. Added focused tests for every violation and a passing grounded review candidate. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented configurable benchmark driver and judge model interfaces. Added provider-neutral driver/judge contracts, model registry, fixture driver, fake local judge using deterministic safety checks plus expected/disallowed traits, and external judge placeholder that fails clearly until a provider adapter is installed. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Created the initial Ciclo benchmark scenario suite with all required fixtures: codex_done_dirty_repo_review, claude_blocked_permission, codex_idle_no_progress, review_findings_to_tasks, and deploy_missing_secret. Strengthened the benchmark scenario loader test to require the full suite and validate complete fixture inputs. Validation: npm run check and just check passed.

Implemented benchmark runner and reports. Added deterministic fixture-suite loading, fixture candidate generation, safety-first scenario execution, configured judge scoring, suite reports with planner version/failures/scores/recommended action, and a ciclo benchmark CLI command. Added focused runner tests and verified CLI smoke output. Validation: npm run check, just check, and node dist/src/cli.js benchmark smoke passed.

Benchmark scenario and scoring epic complete. Implemented scenario schema, deterministic safety checks, configurable driver/judge interfaces, fake local judge, the required five-scenario suite, and a benchmark runner/CLI that runs all five scenarios in dry-run mode with safety-first scored reports including planner version, failures, scores, and recommended action. Validation: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Added context engineering benchmark scenarios for context_warn_threshold, smart_compact_after_bead_done, smart_compact_redacts_sensitive, and force_compact_blocks_dispatch. Updated benchmark tests to support additive scenario suites while asserting required core and context scenarios are present. Verified the expanded benchmark runner covers all nine fixtures. Validation: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Context engineering epic complete. Implemented context budget tracking, context item classification, bounded context packs, smart compaction after Beads transitions, sensitive memory redaction, planner threshold enforcement for warn/compact/force-compact states, and context benchmark scenarios covering warning, smart compaction, redaction, and force-compact dispatch blocking. Validation: npm run check, just check, and expanded ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Added multiuser auth benchmark scenarios for single_mode_auth_ignored, multiuser_unauthenticated_claim_denied, device_flow_user_approved, under_scoped_command_approval_denied, and owner_grants_remote_register. Added loader coverage for the required auth suite and verified the expanded benchmark runner covers all 14 fixtures without failures. Validation: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Multi-user sessions and access-control epic complete. Implemented single/multiuser session modes, OAuth device-code login flow, token lifecycle and introspection, roles/scoped grants, enforcement for work/commands/questions/remotes, MCP/API auth integration, redacted access audit records, and auth benchmark scenarios. Validation: npm run check, just check, and expanded ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Added MCP and remote-session benchmark scenarios for mcp_status_query, mcp_agent_question_to_operator, mcp_operator_answer_routes_back, remote_session_heartbeat_lost, remote_duplicate_claim_prevented, remote_attach_herdr_unavailable, and remote_attach_scope_violation. Added loader coverage for the required MCP/remote suite and verified the expanded benchmark runner covers all 21 fixtures without failures. Validation: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

MCP control plane and remote-session epic complete. Implemented MCP tool/resource/prompt contract, local stdio server, authenticated HTTP mode, policy-guarded work mutations, operator question/feedback routing, Herdr remote attach adapter, remote session registry/heartbeat, duplicate Beads claim prevention, structured remote handoffs, and MCP/remote benchmark scenarios. Validation: npm run check, just check, and expanded ciclo benchmark smoke passed.

Added required Beads remote DB benchmark fixtures for shared Dolt server readiness, Dolt pull-before-claim, required remote outage fail-closed, push-after-update, and conflict handling. Validation passed: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke with 26 scenarios and 0 failures.

Added Beads queue and tracker-sync benchmark scenarios for ready claim dispatch, blocked dependency handling, configured Linear sync, optional Jira sync failure, and transcript redaction before tracker push. Validation passed: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke with 31 scenarios and 0 failures.

Beads work queue remote DB and tracker sync epic complete. Children cover Beads adapter, ready selection and claim flow, prompt building, progress update and close policy, Beads-native tracker sync trigger, Jira/Linear detection, remote DB mode detection, shared Dolt server coordination, Dolt remote pull/push coordination, conflict/degraded health handling, standard claim metadata, and benchmark coverage. Validation passed: npm run check, just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke with 31 scenarios and 0 failures.

Added docs/operator-workflows.md covering review, deploy, benchmark, human approval, remote session, multi-user, failure recovery, and closeout workflows; linked it from README, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and claude/agent.md. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Safety policy audit and operator workflow epic complete. Children cover the default-deny policy gate, response audit log, and operator workflow documentation for review, deploy, benchmark, approval, remote, multi-user, recovery, and closeout. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Implemented goal evolution records and conservative scope checks. Allowed goal refinements now produce loop ID, previous goal, new goal, reason, and evidence records; risky or out-of-scope changes are rejected and routed to the operator. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Loop state and response planner epic complete. Children cover loop config loading/validation, low-cost repo probing, dry-run response planning, and goal evolution records with scope rejection. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Captured structured Herdr explain evidence on normalized observations. JSON explain output now records matched rules, visible flags, and redacted raw payload evidence; text fallback records fallback reason and raw payload evidence, including json_parse_failed through the client fallback path. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Herdr observation adapter epic complete. Children cover CLI adapter foundation, CLI polling target/state reads, observation fixtures, structured errors, remote attach support, and explain evidence capture with matched rule, visible flags, fallback reason, and raw payload evidence. Validation passed: npm run check and just check.

Spec-driven product foundation epic complete. Children cover runtime/package decision, loop config schema, normalized event and loop state schemas, core data structures, Quint verification model, and the Pi TypeScript runtime pivot. Validation passed across the current gate set: npm run check, just check, and benchmark smoke with 31 scenarios and 0 failures.

Harness plugin system epic complete. Children cover the deterministic plugin registry plus first-party Claude Code and Codex harness plugins with bounded policy-guarded prompt builders. Validation passed across the current gate set: npm run check, just check, and benchmark smoke with 31 scenarios and 0 failures.

Ciclo agentic babysitter MVP complete for the demoable environment. Closed child epics cover spec foundation, Herdr observation, harness plugins, loop planner and goal evolution, benchmarks, safety/operator workflow, Beads remote DB and tracker sync, MCP/remote sessions, multi-user access control, and context engineering. Final validation passed: npm run check, just check, Quint via just check, and ciclo benchmark smoke with 31 scenarios and 0 failures.
Implemented Ciclo-managed worker session supervisor, MCP launch/list/stop tools, worker-session resource, docs, and tests. Validation passed: npm run check (236 tests).
Updated benchmarks for Ciclo-managed worker sessions; exercised deterministic suite, real Pi SDK judging for worker scenarios, MCP launch/list/stop/resource flow, and npm run check.

Implemented remote runner launch planning for Kubernetes, AWS Lambda, and Cloudflare with WireGuard tunnel plans, Herdr/Ciclo attach planning, MCP tools/resources, CLI attach command, benchmark scenario, docs, and validation via deterministic benchmark, direct MCP exercise, and npm run check.

Refined remote runner planning to use plugin-backed providers, updated AWS support to Lambda MicroVM command/model semantics, added plugin registration tests and docs, and validated with npm run check.

Named default Ciclo/Herdr sessions after the repository directory, exposed session_name in auth status, updated attach and remote runner defaults, documented behavior, and validated with npm run check.

Implemented external third-party plugin model: extensible remote runner kinds, plugin SDK export, manifest/config validation, install/list/enable/disable CLI, trusted plugin activation for MCP startup, local fixture plugin tests, and documentation. Validated with direct CLI/MCP plugin exercise and npm run check.
Published smol-platform/ciclo as a public GitHub repository and pushed main.
Installed Ciclo from the local checkout with npm link, rebuilt the TypeScript CLI, verified ciclo on PATH, and ran npm run check.
Added ciclo mcp install for Claude/Codex project MCP config, documented project onboarding for Claude-driven Ciclo workflows, removed EGG.md, and validated with npm run check.
Added active Herdr session detection and reuse for Ciclo attach plans, remote runner Herdr sessions, and worker launch names; documented fallback and validated with npm run check.
Rebuilt the current checkout, refreshed npm link, verified installed ciclo exposes mcp install and Herdr session reuse, and ran npm run check.

Added a Ciclo MCP skill for Codex-compatible agents, a Claude project skill wrapper, MCP workflow reference examples, and corrected onboarding tool naming. Validation passed: skill quick_validate and npm run check.
Implemented worker extra_args and launch worktree support; verified with npm run check.
Added ciclo skill install command for Claude and Codex project skills; verified npm run check and skill validation.
Added optional Claude channel mode for MCP install and runtime capability advertisement; verified npm run check and skill validation.
Completed waiting-on-operator state, worker heartbeat, stalled detection, metrics rollups, and MCP/docs coverage.

Completed: added Claude background-agent resolver for ~/.claude daemon roster and session registry, tracks session id/job id/PTY sockets/status, and refreshes detached worker lifecycle from the real agent.
Completed: GitHub board provider now populates PR URL/state/merge state/CI validation data and emits de-duplicated PR opened/merged plus validation pass/fail events through ciclo_poll_events.

Completed: detached Claude agents are tracked from the real registry, event polling covers workers/Beads/questions/blockers/validation/PRs, status and loops are live, board joins Beads/workers/worktrees/PR/CI/merge/validation state, and liveness/waiting/metrics/worktree isolation are implemented and tested.

Completed: board monitoring now detects worker branches that miss an expected PR deadline, emits a blocker.raised event with kind expected_pr_missing, and includes recovery actions for inspect/stop/relaunch. Covered by MCP regression test.

Implemented Herdr pane launch mode for local Claude/Codex workers inside active Herdr sessions; direct process fallback remains via CICLO_REUSE_HERDR_SESSION=false. Added lifecycle tests and docs/skill guidance. Validation: npm run check; quick_validate ciclo-mcp skill.

Added benchmark harness-control scenarios and schema support for Pi/Ciclo decisions against Claude /loop and Codex /goal work. Covered blocker surfacing to controlling session and direct answers for answerable worker questions. Validation: npm run check; quick_validate ciclo-mcp skill.

Added docs/benchmarks.md walking through benchmark commands, fixture shape, Pi judging, safety checks, scenario groups, and adding scenarios. Linked it from docs/getting-started.md. Validation: npm run check.

Confirmed centralized Herdr-pane launch behavior for every local Claude/Codex worker session inside an active Herdr session. Added direct regression coverage for both Claude and Codex launch plans and clarified docs to say every local worker session uses a visible Herdr pane. Validation: npm run build && node --test dist/tests-ts/worker-session-supervisor.test.js; npm run check.

Installed Ciclo globally from this checkout with npm install -g . after building. Verified ciclo resolves to /Users/ztaylor/repos/workspaces/ciclo/dist/src/cli.js, reports version 0.1.0, status/help commands run, and npm run check passes with 284 tests.
